description: Realistic point-and-click adventure character, advanced move set: pickup, use, push, look, sit.

states.name: pickup
states.action: Item pickup: crouch down, grasp, and rise holding an unseen item close to the body. Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.
requirements: Show only the picking-up motion; do not draw the item itself.
Start from standing and end standing, holding the pose that implies a held item.
Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.

states.name: use
states.action: Item-use gesture: reach forward and interact with an unseen object at chest height, pose only. Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.
requirements: Show only the reaching-and-interacting motion; do not draw the object itself.
Character faces the viewer or slightly to the side in every frame.
Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.

states.name: push
states.action: Pushing loop: a braced forward lean and alternating short steps against unseen resistance, viewed from the side. Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.
requirements: The row must unmistakably face right, viewed from the side.
Show a forward-leaning braced posture with small alternating steps.
Do not draw the pushed object itself.
Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.

states.name: look
states.action: Looking/examining pose: a head tilt and lean toward an unseen object of interest, with a small shift between the two frames. Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.
requirements: Character faces the viewer or slightly to the side in both frames.
Keep the pose nearly identical between frames aside from the small head/lean shift.
Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.

states.name: sit
states.action: Sitting idle: a settled seated pose with a very small breathing shift between two nearly identical frames. Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.
requirements: Character is seated in a stable pose in both frames.
Keep the pose nearly identical between frames aside from the subtle idle motion.
Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.
